data.title: CI-script-tests: legacy plugin_root refs and stale doc template references -> test-doc-migration.sh and test-example-doc-templates.sh fail
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Two script tests fail due to stale references:
1. test-doc-migration.sh: test_no_legacy_plugin_root_refs — finds legacy PLUGIN_ROOT references that should have been migrated
2. test-example-doc-templates.sh: dso_setup_references_new_template — dso-setup.sh references an outdated template path

## Expected Behavior
All legacy plugin root references should be migrated; doc templates should reference current paths.

## Actual Behavior
Legacy references persist in the codebase.

## Evidence
CI run 24319865314 (2026-04-13), Script Tests job.
